nodes.label: Add a payment to an invoice and update its status.
nodes.norm_label: add a payment to an invoice and update its status.

nodes.label: CAI Sequence Registry
nodes.rationale: Lists fiscal CAI invoice sequences for one company, summarizing total, active, and expired sequences and exposing edit/delete actions.

nodes.label: CAI Authorization Form
nodes.rationale: Captures fiscal CAI key, authorized range, current correlativo when editing, and expiration date for invoice numbering compliance.

nodes.label: Contact Directory
nodes.rationale: Lists contacts with search, contact-type tabs, pagination, drawer-based create/edit, and delete confirmation.

nodes.label: Contact Type Filtering
nodes.rationale: Tabs filter contacts by customer, supplier, customer_supplier, lead, and other while preserving search terms.

nodes.label: Contact Detail Screen
nodes.rationale: Displays a contact profile and switches related content by contact type, including customer invoices or supplier products.

nodes.label: Customer Invoice History
nodes.rationale: For customer contacts, the template lists invoice documents, dates, totals, statuses, and links to invoice detail pages.

nodes.label: Supplier Product History
nodes.rationale: For supplier contacts, the template lists supplied products with stock and unit price.

nodes.label: ERP Summary Dashboard
nodes.rationale: Aggregates monthly revenue, pending invoices, client count, inventory count, recent invoices, recent quotes, and quick actions for the selected company.

nodes.label: Dashboard Quick Actions
nodes.rationale: When a company slug exists in session, the sidebar offers direct actions for a new invoice, new client, and payment registration.

nodes.label: Employee Directory
nodes.rationale: Lists employees with search, active/inactive filtering, class filtering, PTO balance visibility, and drawer-based create/edit/delete actions.

nodes.label: Employee Editor Drawer
nodes.rationale: Captures personal information, optional linked user, employment classification, dates, standard working hours/days, compensation, PTO accrual, and notes.

nodes.label: PTO Configuration
nodes.rationale: Defines an employee's PTO balance, accrual rate, and accrual period so leave workflows can show or consume available time off.

nodes.label: Leave Request Queue
nodes.rationale: Lists leave requests with filters for status, leave type, and employee, plus drawer actions for creating, viewing, and deleting requests.

nodes.label: Leave Request Form
nodes.rationale: Creates or edits leave requests by selecting employee, leave type, start/end dates, reason, and conditional attachments for sick or maternity leave.

nodes.label: Leave Review Panel
nodes.rationale: Shows leave details, attachment preview, and approve/reject review actions when a leave request is pending.

nodes.label: Work Schedule Calendar
nodes.rationale: Uses FullCalendar in Spanish to display schedule events, leave events, and deviation events with week/month/day views.

nodes.label: Schedule Deviation Form
nodes.rationale: Creates or edits a one-day work schedule deviation by selecting employee, date, start time, end time, and notes.

nodes.label: Schedule Deviation Detail
nodes.rationale: Drawer detail view for a specific schedule deviation, showing employee, date, start/end times, notes, edit, and delete controls.

nodes.label: Product Detail Screen
nodes.rationale: Shows product details, stock status, price/cost/tax/discount metrics, total stock value, warehouse distribution, movement history, barcode label access, and edit controls.

nodes.label: Warehouse Stock Distribution
nodes.rationale: Displays per-warehouse item quantities and offers adjustment and transfer drawers from the product detail page.

nodes.label: Stock Adjustment Form
nodes.rationale: Drawer form submits an AJAX JSON stock adjustment for a product and warehouse, allowing positive or negative quantity changes.

nodes.label: Stock Transfer Form
nodes.rationale: Drawer form transfers product stock between two different warehouses using FormData and an AJAX POST.

nodes.label: Company Scoped Navigation
nodes.rationale: Dashboard, contacts, HR, and inventory templates build links around the selected company identifier or slug.

nodes.label: Invoice Or Quote Document Form Screen
nodes.rationale: A single create/edit interface handles invoices and quotes by varying title, hidden type, status defaults, and submit copy from doc_type and invoice state.
nodes.norm_label: invoice or quote document form screen

nodes.label: Invoice Client Picker Modal
nodes.rationale: The form guides users to select a registered client through a searchable modal before submitting the document.

nodes.label: Invoice Product And Item Editor
nodes.rationale: Line items combine catalog product lookup, manual descriptions, quantities, prices, discounts, and computed subtotal/total displays.

nodes.label: Invoice Optional Project Picker
nodes.rationale: Invoices can optionally be associated to a project through a searchable modal with clear/remove behavior.

nodes.label: Invoice Embedded Form Data
nodes.rationale: The template serializes clients, inventory items, projects, doc type, and item index as JSON for client-side modal and line-item behavior.

nodes.label: Invoice And Quote List Screen
nodes.rationale: The screen centralizes invoice and quote discovery with search, type filters, status filters, document counts, row actions, and pagination.

nodes.label: Invoice Status Filter Sidebar
nodes.rationale: Sidebar links preserve search parameters while filtering by invoice types and statuses such as paid, pending, overdue, and draft.

nodes.label: Invoice Detail Screen
nodes.rationale: The detail page combines document identity, status, client details, line items, totals, payments, payment capture, audit logs, and print/PDF actions.

nodes.label: Invoice Inline Payment Capture Form
nodes.rationale: Unpaid invoice details include a POST form for amount, date, method, and transaction reference to record a payment without leaving the invoice.

nodes.label: Invoice Audit Log Modal
nodes.rationale: Audit rows expose old and new JSON data through a modal to review document changes.

nodes.label: Purchase Order Form Screen
nodes.rationale: The purchase order form guides users through supplier selection, destination warehouse, purchase date, product lines, and a sticky summary before create/update.

nodes.label: Purchase Order Supplier Picker Modal
nodes.rationale: Suppliers are selected through a searchable modal that fills hidden supplier_id and visible supplier summary fields.

nodes.label: Purchase Order Product Line Editor
nodes.rationale: Order items use catalog selection, SKU/code, quantity, high-precision unit price, row totals, and live aggregate totals.

nodes.label: Purchase Order List Screen
nodes.rationale: The order index supports supplier, date, and text filters, export, summary metrics, row actions, empty-state creation, and pagination.

nodes.label: Purchase Order Detail Screen
nodes.rationale: The detail page presents supplier, date, total, item list, edit/delete actions, and navigation back to the order list.

nodes.label: Payment Form Screen
nodes.rationale: The payment form registers or edits received payments with optional invoice association, amount/date fields, method cards, notes, and live sidebar/summary updates.

nodes.label: Payment Method Selector
nodes.rationale: Payment methods are represented as radio-backed cards for cash, card, transfer, and check with visual state updates.

nodes.label: Payment Invoice Association
nodes.rationale: Payments may be linked to an invoice either from a selected invoice context or by entering a document_id.

nodes.label: Payment List Screen
nodes.rationale: The payments index offers method/date/search filters, payment totals by method, invoice/client links, row actions, empty-state creation, and pagination.

nodes.label: Payment Detail Screen
nodes.rationale: The payment detail focuses on amount, method, invoice linkage, payment metadata, notes, delete action, and navigation back to payments or invoice.

nodes.label: TrackDesk Marketing Landing Page
nodes.rationale: The public page positions TrackDesk as an integrated business platform and drives users to login, feature exploration, or WhatsApp contact.

nodes.label: Integrated ERP Value Proposition
nodes.rationale: Feature cards explicitly frame accounting, HR, inventory, warehouses, purchase orders, CRM, invoicing, and multi-company management as one centralized system.

nodes.label: Global Search Results Screen
nodes.rationale: Search results group matched items by section and link directly to entity URLs for contacts, documents, inventory items, purchase orders, and companies.

nodes.label: User Form Drawer
nodes.rationale: The user form can render in a blank AJAX drawer or full base layout and captures identity, password, role, and company assignment.

nodes.label: User Role And Company Assignment
nodes.rationale: Privileged users can assign a role and one or more companies, supported by an inline role guide that explains permission tiers.

nodes.label: User Administration List Screen
nodes.rationale: The user index provides status/role/search filters, account stats, drawer-based creation/editing, status toggles, protected-user rules, delete actions, and pagination.

nodes.label: User Status Toggle Workflow
nodes.rationale: Inline JavaScript posts CSRF-protected requests to toggle active status, updates row state, and emits toast feedback.

nodes.label: User Profile Screen
nodes.rationale: The user detail page shows profile identity, account information, assigned companies, quick stats, status controls, edit drawer actions, and a danger zone.

nodes.label: User Danger Zone
nodes.rationale: Non-self, non-protected users expose activate/deactivate and permanent delete actions inside a dedicated risk section.

nodes.label: Shared List Filter Pagination Pattern
nodes.rationale: Multiple operational index screens combine top search, sidebar filters, tabular results, row actions, empty states, and pagination.

nodes.label: Financial Document Payment Flow
nodes.rationale: Invoices display received payments and can register new payments; payment screens can link back to associated invoices.

hyperedges.label: HR Leave And Schedule Review Flow
